description: Three queries that ask the assistant to create new notes referencing existing vault notes. Success = the file exists at the expected path, contains every required [[wiki-link]], and has the expected tags.

queries.query: Create a new note at projects/Attention_Summary.md titled Attention Summary. Give it a short two-sentence intro about attention research in the vault, then link to every research note tagged 'attention'. Tag the new note with summary and attention.

Write a cheat sheet note at reference/Python_Cheat_Sheet.md that pulls together my python-tagged reference notes. Short intro then a See also section with a wiki-link to each one. Tag it with reference and python.

Create a literature review note at research/Transformer_Lineage.md that traces the prerequisites of the Transformers note. Briefly describe how transformers build on prior attention research, then list wiki-links to the notes Transformers itself references. Tag it with literature-review and transformer.
